introSection: Screem Machine was a Wooden roller coaster located at Nickel's Midway Pier in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Despite the fact that it has modern wooden coaster rails and tracks, there are no upstop wheels on the train whatsoever.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster used to be known as Jack Rabbit from opening in 1919 until 1975 when it was renamed to Screem Machine.

fullText:
Screem Machine was a Wooden roller coaster located at Nickel's Midway Pier in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA.



Despite the fact that it has modern wooden coaster rails and tracks, there are no upstop wheels on the train whatsoever.

The coaster used to be known as Jack Rabbit from opening in 1919 until 1975 when it was renamed to Screem Machine.
